offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inconsistent maintenance tracking causes compliance issues. We provide compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem: Inconsistent property maintenance can lead to compliance issues and potential fines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where property managers seek advice
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance schedules on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
